title: woof test-marker configuration
description: Project-side declaration at .woof/test-markers.toml. Tells Stage 5 Check 2 (spec coverage) where to look for tests and how to recognise outcome markers in source. Per-language; ships with python and typescript defaults that consumers extend. Marker regex is anchored on word boundaries by default (\bO\d+\b) to prevent substring false-positives.

test_paths.description: Glob patterns under repo root. Stage 5 Check 2 scans only these paths.

marker_regex.description: Regex matching outcome IDs in test source. Default '\bO\d+\b'. Word-boundary anchoring is essential to avoid substring matches (test_IO12 would otherwise match O1).

cd_marker_regex.description: Regex matching contract-decision IDs. Default '\bCD\d+\b'. Optional; falls back to a CD-equivalent of marker_regex when absent.

docstring_keyword.description: Keyword introducing an outcomes list inside a docstring or block comment, e.g. 'outcomes:' yields recognition of '"""outcomes: [O1, O2]"""'.

comment_prefix.description: Single-line comment introducer (#, //, --). Used when scanning adjacent lines above a test definition for marker comments.

context_lines.description: How many lines above a test definition to scan for marker comments.
